about_p1: Hi! I'm Sertaç, a software developer. I enjoy building clean, maintainable, and well-designed software.
about_p2: I primarily develop full-stack projects within the Angular and NestJS ecosystem. TypeScript, PostgreSQL, Docker, and CI/CD pipelines are among my daily tools.
about_p3: Exploring new technologies, contributing to open source projects, and sharing what I learn are the things that motivate me.
